project_type: Node.js pnpm monorepo with Turborepo - 9 Fastify API apps + 28 shared packages
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm turbo build to verify TypeScript compiles. 2. Run pnpm turbo test to run all 547 tests. 3. Validate Terraform with terraform fmt -check. 4. Validate YAML/JSON structure.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can install npm packages. No Docker daemon available for building images. No terraform binary for validation. Node.js 22 available. Use AST/syntax validation where possible.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. ESLint + Prettier enforced. TypeScript strict mode.
key_patterns: All apps use @quant/server-core createApp pattern. Backend services in apps/*/backend/app.ts with getConfig() and buildApp() functions. Packages expose via src/index.ts. Existing Dockerfile for quantmail at apps/quantmail/Dockerfile uses multi-stage build with node:22-alpine, pnpm, non-root user pattern.
directory_structure: apps/ - 9 apps (quantchat:3002, quantmail:3001, quantai:3020, quantsync:3004, quantads:3005, quantube:3006, quantneon:3007, quantedits:3008, quantmax:3009). packages/ - 28 shared packages. Each app has api/ (legacy Express-style), backend/ (new Fastify with server-core). packages/realtime has WebSocket server.
